feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1745 201 1544 76
US 1609 176 1433 60

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: CovertCam
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

The original black screen camera app. No nonsense app with no silly gimmicks. Take a photo or video with a touch of the blacked out screen. Made for concert and festival goers Features include: - Discrete preview window that can be hidden - Live photos available - Burst mode All settings can be uniquely set to your preferences and saved. CovertCam v4.0.2 features: - Single tap anywhere on screen for photo - Swipe right to toggle video mode, then double tap anywhere on screen for video (double tap again to stop) - Swipe left to toggle front/rear cameras - Swipe right to toggle photo/video mode - Press and hold (3+ seconds) for settings/removing settings menu - Burst mode - Takes a photo every x seconds Coming soon: - Integration with Apple Watch PLEASE NOTE: In order to take video you need to be in 'video mode' - Swipe right and you toggle between photo and video mode. An indication that you are in 'video mode' will be that the view finder will slightly enlarge. Once in 'video mode' you can double tap to start the video. It is currently not possible to auto-disable the shutter sound of the camera when taking a photo. It is against the iOS Developer Program License Agreement. It is against iOS Developer Program License Agreement to not have indications on the screen when taking a photo and/or video.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 生辰 — 桌面时间小组件
entry.id: 生辰 — 桌面时间小组件-us-1770794001854
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 永久会员：$14.99 → $12.99 [$12.99 ~ $19.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 生辰-年度会员：$12.99
  • 生辰年度会员：$9.99
  • 月度会员：$1.99
  • 永久会员：$12.99
  • 生辰-季度会员：$12.99

Application Description

这是一款关于生、死、心愿与延续的App。 小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。 时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。 有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。 而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。 生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路： - 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。 - 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。 - 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据 美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道： "如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。 我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。 我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。" 因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。 【生辰 App 会员服务说明】 1.会员包含几种订购类型 订阅周期：1个月、3个月、12个月 2.首次订购后会通过iTunes账户直接支付；账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后自动顺延一个订阅周期 3.本服务由您自主选择是否续订，如需取消，请在订阅到期24小时前，在 AppleID 设置中取消 4.生辰App 会员协议 生辰App 会员服务协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-payment/ 5.生辰App 软件协议与隐私政策 生辰 软件许可及服务协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-agreement/ 生辰 隐私协议：https://post.jellow.club/whatslife-privacy/

entry.title: Raiders Map
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Raider Mk. 2：$17.99 → $8.99 [$8.99 ~ $17.99]
  • Raider Mk. 3：$29.99 → $12.99 [$12.99 ~ $29.99]
  • Raider Mk. 1：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Raider Mk. 2：$8.99
  • Raider Mk. 3：$12.99
  • Raider Mk. 1：$0.99
  • Raider Weekly：$1.99

Application Description

All in one app for an Interactive Map, Loot locations, Material list and breakdown list, Enemy drop list, guides and quest-line guides. - Interactive Maps - Sort and Filter - Event Timers and Notifications - Guides for Quests Guides and Maps are partially available for free, but a Pro membership is required to access all content Raiders Map is the best tool for easy access to everything, along with world class support. You can reach me directly on X for help or to report any issues: All4nDev, or through discord. Not affiliated with embark. Raiders Map is independently owned and managed. apple standard EULA https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Game Dev Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → Free [Free ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Manage your own game company and try to create a million-selling game in this unique simulation. Features the ability to develop your company's own game console, plus a system for changing your staff members' professions. Hire talented people and train them to develop their skills. As your staff gets more experience, you will unlock a wider array of game genres and content to develop. Try to find the most popular combinations and develop for the latest platform! Your staff members can have a variety of game-related professions, from programmer to sound engineer. Work hard and you may reach the top of the video game industry! -- Try searching for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at https://kairopark.jp. Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and our paid games! https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 真武三国 英雄集结
entry.id: 真武三国 英雄集结-us-1770788364367
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • SP武将碎片：$39.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $39.99]

All Price Information

Price：$0.29

In-App Purchases

  • 心愿礼包：$5.99
  • 聚财盆：$2.99
  • 超值月卡：$3.99
  • 豪华月卡：$9.99
  • 节日礼包：$3.99
  • 节日大礼包：$29.99
  • 新手导师：$9.99
  • 犒赏令：$9.99
  • SP武将碎片：$3.99
  • 竞赛VIP赛季卡：$3.99

Application Description

游戏特色： 1）Q版水墨风！ 角色，场景，UI均采用中国古典水墨风格，高端大气上档次，低调奢华有内涵。 2）百名武将，绝无雷同！ 超过一百位绝无雷同的武将和技能，考验英雄组合，操作和策略。 3）合体技系统！ 痛快淋漓的合体技系统，简单刺激的触发方式，给您前所未有的战斗体验。 4）六大职业系统！ 六大职业，五大势力，职业定位更加明确，玩法更加多变。 5）九大模式！ 战役，挑战，竞赛，无双，奇境，试炼，八阵，领地，袭击九大创新模式，等您来战。 ※ 如有任何问题和建议，可通过以下方式联系我们，我们一定尽快给您答复！祝您游戏愉快！ QQ交流群1：9222266 QQ交流群2：758352295 QQ交流群3：203399926 微信公众账号：oneonegames

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: ThreeKingdoms The Last Warlord
entry.summary:
Price: $12.99 → $2.99
Oath of Heaven：Wei: $1.99 → $0.99
Art Upgrade Pack: $3.99 → $0.99
Oath of Heaven: $3.99 → $2.99
Heroes Assemble: $3.99 → $1.99
Dawn of Heroes: $3.99 → $1.99
Feature DLC: $3.99 → $1.99
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$12.99 → $2.99 [$2.99 ~ $12.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Oath of Heaven：Wei：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $1.99]
  • Art Upgrade Pack：$3.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $3.99]
  • Oath of Heaven：$3.99 → $2.99 [$2.99 ~ $3.99]
  • Heroes Assemble：$3.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $3.99]
  • Dawn of Heroes：$3.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $3.99]
  • Feature DLC：$3.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $3.99]

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

In-App Purchases

  • Treasures Editor：$0.99
  • Oath of Heaven：Wei：$0.99
  • Art Upgrade Pack：$0.99
  • Oath of Heaven：$2.99
  • Heroes Assemble：$1.99
  • Dawn of Heroes：$1.99
  • Feature DLC：$1.99
  • Oath of Heaven：Wu：$1.99

Application Description

Requirements of The Last Warlord: To ensure the game's normal operation, it is required that iOS version should be higher than iOS Version 16 and use iPhone X or X Plus, iPhone 12 or above, or iPad Air 2, iPad mini 4, iPad 2017 or any iPad Pro to run the game. Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/threekingdomsthelastwarlord Forum: https://steamcommunity.com/app/577230/discussions/1/ Three Kingdoms: The Last Warlord is a turn-based lord-playing strategy game developed by the Chengdu Longyou Studio. The studio created this game world set in the period of the Three Kingdoms mainly based on people's opinions on other games set in that period. The game is very detailed in depicting the differences between various cities and also the abilities and features of the military officers. The game also applies an appealing battle system in which weather, landforms, and many other factors will influence the result of each battle. The game is based on the famous Chinese historical novel by Luo Guanzhong (about A.D. 1330 - 1400). I. Simple and graceful graphics finished by fine-lined drawing The portrait of every character in the game is finished by fine-lined drawing with the same style as the picture-story books "Romance of the Three Kingdoms". All interfaces of the game are designed in a typical Chinese style. II. The governing modes are easy to get started with: There are easy governing modes in the game so that players can manage various affairs easily and spend more time enjoying its other facets. Due to the game's lord-playing mode, players do not need to pay much attention to cities besides their own capital. Instead, they can order prefects to govern other cities and later on give them commands when necessary. III. A rich variety of gameplay and contents Over 1,300 officers are available in the game (including those recorded in historical books and novels). There are up to 30 attributes for officers. Over 300 features of officers are available. Over 500 kinds of verified precious items have been applied to the game world for players of different preferences to choose from. Over 60 cities of different styles and 200 features of cities are available. There are also abundant techs research and development items. Its system of combat units contains three main kinds of combat units and about 20 kinds of special combat units. Ultra abundant official positions. Numerous simulated natural phenomena, incidents and disasters will highly represent the calamitous period of the Three Kingdoms. Travelling around will trigger various incidents. IV. The turn-based battle mode requires careful planning in deploying troops Weather, landforms, and even the height of the battlefield will influence any battles in the game. There's also a siege mechanism with a great gaming environment. There are various siege vehicles for players to storm castles and also defending their own castles. V. Other functions There are also other functions available in the game. Cloud Save Steam Cards The achievement system allows players to collect and show off achievements.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Genius Scan Enterprise - PDF
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Genius Scan Ultra：$49.99 → $4.99 [$4.99 ~ $49.99]

All Price Information

Price：$49.99

In-App Purchases

  • Genius Scan Ultra：$4.99
  • Super Large Tip：$9.99
  • Generous Tip：$2.99
  • Small Tip：$0.99

Application Description

Genius Scan is a document scanner app in your pocket. Quickly scan your paper documents on the go and export them as multi-page PDF files. *** Apple App of the Week *** 20+ million users *** 1000s of small businesses *** Place any document in front of your device’s camera: our scanner app automatically recognizes the paper against the background, crops it, and cleans up the result. You obtain a crisp, legible scan. Batch scanning lets you scan dozens of pages in a matter of seconds. Powerful tools help you organize, share, or archive your documents. “Next time you plan to hit the road, don’t forget to download Genius Scan to make life easier for yourself and your accounting department.” - AppPicker.com “Camera apps aren’t designed for close-up text scanning, but Genius Scan is.” - The Guardian == ENTERPRISE EDITION == Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan: - All the premium features of the Genius Scan Plus Premium Plan (denoted with + below), out of the box (no upgrade needed). Managed Configuration: - Deployment to fleets of devices managed by a MDM tool - Pre-configuration of app settings on a per-user basis (eg. set default email address, WebDAV/FTP credentials) - Control of which apps and services users can export documents to - No ads == KEY FEATURES == Smart Scanning: - Document detection & background removal - Distortion correction - Shadow removal and defect cleanup - Filters (black & white, whiteboard, photo) - Batch scanning PDF Creation & Editing: - Document merging & splitting - Multiple page PDF creation - Photos and PDF import Security & Privacy: - On-device document processing + Face ID locking + PDF password encryption Document Organization: - Document tagging - Metadata and content search + Smart document renaming (custom templates, …) + Backup and multi-device sync with Genius Cloud (separate subscription) Export: - Email + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. + Any WebDAV compatible service such as Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. + Automatic background auto-export OCR (Text Recognition): + Text extraction + Searchable PDF creation + Business card scanning & contact creation == ABOUT US == It’s in the heart of Paris, France that The Grizzly Labs develops Genius Scan. We take pride in crafting apps that help millions of users throughout the world and hold ourselves to the highest standards in terms of quality and privacy. Get in touch with us @thegrizzlylabs if you have any questions. == PRICING & LEGAL == You can subscribe to Genius Cloud for backup & synchronization. In that case, Genius Scan’s store displays the duration and price of each subscription, updated at the time of purchase. Payment will be charged to iTunes account when the order is confirmed. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off no later than 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage subscriptions, disable auto-renewal in the iTunes account settings. https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

entry.title: Black Border 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → $0.49 [$0.49 ~ $1.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.49

Application Description

Inspect papers, prevent smuggling—keep the border safe or profit from corruption. Ready to become a Border Police Officer? Step into the world of Black Border 2: Border Patrol Simulator and experience the intense pressure of national security. As a Customs Officer, your duty is to protect the nation from illegal smuggling. Inspect passports, scrutinize documents, and use advanced tools to make life-or-death decisions in this gripping police simulator game. Take on the duty of a Border Patrol Agent and protect your nation's borders. Your role is crucial: Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports, permits, and papers to approve or reject entrants. Advanced Tools: Utilize X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and weigh stations to check vehicle legitimacy. Canine Unit: Deploy your loyal service dog to sniff out concealed contraband and uncover secrets. Strategic Decisions: Every choice you make impacts the safety of your country. NEW FEATURES in Black Border 2: Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports and permits to approve or reject entrants as a customs officer. Endless Mode: Test your border patrol skills in a nonstop, challenging experience. Bus Arrivals: Manage large buses and check every passenger's documents carefully. Advanced Scanning: Utilize new X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and contraband. Weigh Stations: Ensure vehicle weights match their records, a key part of your police duty. Canine Unit: Your faithful service dog is now a crucial partner in finding hidden contraband. Each day as a border inspector brings new challenges that will push your customs police skills to the limit. Are you ready to face the pressure and become a true hero of national security? Download Black Border 2 today and get ready to defend the nation!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Waterlogue: Photo to Painting
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → Free [Free ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Monthly)：$1.99
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Yearly)：$7.99
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：$19.99

Application Description

You don’t need to paint to create beautiful watercolor images—Waterlogue captures the essence of your photos in brilliant, liquid color. See the world like an artist. FEATURES: • Create art that looks hand-painted • Photos become luminous watercolors in seconds • Expressive styles for portraits, landscapes, and more • Beautiful results for people and pets • Print-quality export for frameable art • Simulated watercolor, not AI • Private by design—your photos never leave your device • Customize borders, lightness, and detail ACCLAIM: • Over one million sold since 2013 • Awarded "App Store Best of 2014" by Apple • Featured as App Store App of the Day • Oprah's holiday pick! "Made with Love: DIY Gifts"—O, The Oprah Magazine • “…with Waterlogue, it’s clear that there’s a very thoughtful human touch behind the app’s painterly algorithms.” —WIRED • “…Waterlogue is going to utterly amaze you, as it’s the first app I’ve seen that gives results that really look like a watercolor painting.” —Cult of Mac • “Watercolor apps may not be a new idea, but Waterlogue does it in a gorgeous, intuitive way, and it’s quite a pleasure to use.” —AppAdvice.com • “It goes beyond typical Photoshop watercolor filters because it has more visual intelligence, and more of the feel of the real paint.” —James Gurney, Artist and Author of Dinotopia • From Tinrocket, creator of This by Tinrocket (App Store Best of 2016), Olli (App Store Best of 2017), and more KEEP UP WITH TINROCKET: • Follow @Tinrocket on Instagram for the latest! • We’re here to help: If you have a question or need assistance, you can always email us at support@tinrocket.com • If you like Waterlogue, please consider leaving an App Store review or rating. Every review counts and helps indie developers like ourselves. Waterlogue® and See the world like an artist® are registered trademarks of Tinrocket, LLC

entry.title: BimmerLink for BMW and MINI
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • BimmerLink full version：$44.99 → $39.99 [$39.99 ~ $44.99]

All Price Information

Price：$39.99

In-App Purchases

  • CarPlay Add-On：$9.99
  • BimmerLink full version：$39.99

Application Description

BimmerLink is the direct link to your BMW or MINI. Using one of the supported OBD adapters, you can read trouble codes or display sensor values in realtime, check the current state of the DPF in your car or register a new battery after replacement. BimmerLink even allows you to remotely control the exhaust flap or mute the Active Sound Design in your car. READ AND CLEAR TROUBLE CODES Diagnose your car as would otherwise be possible only by your Service Partner. In contrast to generic OBD apps that read emission related errors only, BimmerLink allows you to read and clear trouble codes from ALL control units in your car. DISPLAY REALTIME SENSOR VALUES BimmerLink provides a big selection of values like oil temperature or boost pressure. Keep an eye on all the important parameters of your car with a personalized dashboard. EXHAUST FLAP REMOTE CONTROL* Take control over the exhaust flap in your car and decide yourself, whether it should be closed or open. ACTIVE SOUND DESIGN** If you do not like the artificial engine sound generated in your car, just mute the Active Sound Design with BimmerLink. SOUND TUNING*** The “Sound Tuning” option allows you to disable the “exhaust burble“ in cars equipped with the S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4). DPF REGENERATION**** BimmerLink allows you to check the current state of the diesel particulate filter in your car. Find out when the last regeneration took place or how much ash has accumulated in the filter and start a regeneration with the touch of a button. CARPLAY ADD-ON***** Enhance your driving experience with the CarPlay add-on for BimmerLink. Access your sensor values on your car's display for improved vehicle monitoring, all integrated seamlessly with CarPlay for ease of use. BATTERY REGISTRATION If you want to replace the battery in your car, this has to be registered in the engine control unit and BimmerLink allows you to do this yourself now. PARKING BRAKE SERVICE MODE BimmerLink allows you to activate the service mode for the electromechanical parking brake. SERVICE RESET Reset the service display in your car after carrying out maintenance work like a brake pad replacement or an engine oil change. RESET SHORT CIRCUIT LOCKS Unlock lamp outputs that were disabled due to a short circuit. TRANSMISSION ADAPTATION VALUES Check the adaptation values of the ZF 8HP automatic transmission in your vehicle. REQUIRED ACCESSORIES To use the app, one of the supported Bluetooth or WiFi OBD adapters or cables is required. For more information please visit https://bimmerlink.app. SUPPORTED CARS - 1 Series (2004+) - 2 Series, M2 (2013+) - 2 Series Active Tourer (2014+) - 2 Series Gran Tourer (2015+) - 3 Series, M3 (2005+) - 4 Series, M4 (2013+) - 5 Series, M5 (2003+) - 6 Series, M6 (2003+) - 7 Series (2008+) - 8 Series (2018+) - X1 (2009+) - X2 (2018+) - X3, X3 M (2010+) - X4, X4 M (2014+) - X5, X5 M (2006+) - X6, X6 M (2008+) - X7 (2019+) - Z4 (2009+) - i3 (2013+) - i4 (2021+) - i7 (2022+) - i8 (2013+) - iX (2021+) - iX1 (2022+) - iX3 (2021+) - MINI (2006+) - Toyota Supra (2019+) * Only for cars that are equipped with an exhaust flap by factory. ** Only for cars that are equipped with the “Active Sound Design“ by factory. *** Only for cars with S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4). **** Only for cars with a diesel engine. ***** Additional in-app purchase required.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Bendy and the Ink Machine
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Henry was the lead animator at Joey Drew Studios in its 1930s heyday, a studio that was best known for producing animated cartoons of their most popular and beloved character, Bendy. Many years later Henry receives a mysterious invitation from Joey Drew himself to return to the old cartoon workshop. Journey deep into the sketchy madness of this twisted cartoon nightmare. Fight the darkness. Escape the Ink Demon. Fear the Machine. • Varied Game Play! - First person combat, horror, puzzles, stealth and numerous hidden secrets. • A Beautiful Cartoon World! - Lovingly crafted by a small indie studio. • A Global Bendy Community! - Delve deep into the mystery and join the discussion at joeydrewstudios.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Dune: Imperium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $7.99 [$6.99 ~ $10.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：$9.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $9.99]

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：$7.99
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：$9.99

Application Description

Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium! Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal. Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader. Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning. Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same! Control the Spice. Control the Universe. Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it. Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ark Nova
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$10.99 → $7.99 [$7.99 ~ $10.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

Application Description

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game. In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans. Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are: BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions. ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo. CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards). ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks. SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money. With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

entry.title: Root Board Game
entry.summary:
Price: $9.99 → $4.99
The Riverfolk Expansion: $9.99 → $6.99
Root: The Underworld Expansion: $9.99 → $6.99
Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds: $7.99 → $5.99
Root: The Marauder Expansion: $9.99 → $8.99
The Clockwork Expansion: $5.99 → $3.99
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $4.99 [$3.99 ~ $9.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：$9.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $9.99]
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：$9.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $9.99]
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：$7.99 → $5.99 [$5.99 ~ $7.99]
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：$9.99 → $8.99 [$8.99 ~ $9.99]
  • The Clockwork Expansion：$5.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $5.99]

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：$6.99
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：$6.99
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：$5.99
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：$8.99
  • The Clockwork Expansion：$3.99
  • Hirelings & Landmarks：$9.99

Application Description

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness. The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods. Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright. The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 召喚騎士團
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 故事模式+自由模式合集：$8.99 → $5.39 [$4.49 ~ $8.99]
  • 劇情模式：$4.99 → $2.99 [$2.49 ~ $4.99]
  • 自由模式：$4.99 → $2.99 [$2.49 ~ $4.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 故事模式+自由模式合集：$5.39
  • 劇情模式：$2.99
  • 自由模式：$2.99

Application Description

【Game Introduction】 'Call of Knights' is an RPG card pixel-style game developed by Olive Panda Studio. It is divided into two parts: 'Song of the Knight' and 'Shining Stars,' each offering unique gameplay and content. The game adopts paid download, in-app purchase to unlock model to access all gameplay content. 【In-App Purchases Unlock】 Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD Story Mode of Song of the Knight: $4.99 USD Free Mode of Shining Stars: $4.99 USD Both modes support experiencing before paying for unlocking. 'Song of the Knight' can be experienced for free until the end of the second chapter, and 'Shining Stars' offers free gameplay for one year. Note: The amounts will be converted based on the local exchange rate. 'Song of the Knight': The story is adapted from the Nobel Prize-winning author Henrik Hien's 'The Knights of the Cross.' The main gameplay involves RPG role-playing with cards, incorporating a partner skill combo system during card battles. Different cards played release exclusive skills, constructing various playstyles. Players will also meet and recruit numerous companions, embarking on an epic journey. 'Shining Stars': The game is set in a magical continent called Antana, featuring six countries with diverse customs. Players take on the role of a small lord in one of the kingdoms. As the demonic realm is about to invade the continent, players must travel far and wide to find companions for their knightly order, establish their own knightly order, embark on adventures, strengthen their abilities, and defend the human frontlines. 【Device Support】 · iOS 10.0 and above · Operating memory of 3GB and above · iPhone 7 and above · iPad Air 3 and above 【Contact Us】 If you need assistance during the game or encounter issues, feel free to contact us via email. Official Email: knight@longyougame.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.content:

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

entry.title: Boolean!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.29 → Free [Free ~ $0.29]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

It may not disappear when the cubes in real life are intertwined, according to boolean algebra why not. We are trying to reach the geometric shape above by moving the object we want. This minimal puzzle game, only for people who have visual intelligence. Features: -isometric illusion -88 peaceful level -atmospheric and relaxing music -all game developed by one people Follow me: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fatihindiegames/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/fatihindiegames

entry.title: Resident Evil Village for Mac
entry.summary:
Price: $39.99 → $9.99
DLC pack: $19.99 → $9.99
All Access Voucher: $4.99 → $1.99
Street Wolf Outfit: $2.99 → $2.29
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$39.99 → $9.99 [Free ~ $39.99]）

In-App Purchases

  • DLC pack：$19.99 → $9.99 [$9.99 ~ $19.99]
  • All Access Voucher：$4.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $4.99]
  • Street Wolf Outfit：$2.99 → $2.29 [$2.29 ~ $2.99]

All Price Information

Price：$9.99

In-App Purchases

  • DLC pack：$9.99
  • All Access Voucher：$1.99
  • Street Wolf Outfit：$2.29

Application Description

Experience survival horror like never before in the 8th major installment in the Resident Evil franchise - Resident Evil Village. With detailed graphics, intense first-person action and masterful storytelling, the terror has never felt more realistic. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■In-App Purchases ■Resident Evil Village (Base Game) ・The Trauma Pack DLC ・Samurai Edge - AW Model-01 ・Resident Evil 7 Found Footage Filter ・Resident Evil 7 Tape Recorder Save Point ・Saferoom Music "Go Tell Aunt Rhody" ・Mr. Everywhere Weapon Charm ・Unlock "Village of Shadows" Difficulty ・The Tragedy of Ethan Winters Artwork ・The Baker Incident Report ・Survival Resources Pack ・Mr. Raccoon Weapon Charm ■Winters' Expansion ・Experience brand-new additional content for the award-winning modern horror masterpiece Resident Evil Village: Third Person Mode, The Mercenaries Additional Orders, and Shadows of Rose. ・Street Wolf Outfit ・Street Wolf Outfit for Rose (applies to Shadow of Rose content only) ■Extra Content Shop All Access Vouche ------------------------------------------------------------ ■By purchasing, you will be granted a license to use the product. ■A network connection is required when starting the application. ■About the End User License Agreement ・This End User License Agreement (this “Agreement”) applies to the user’s use of this game software program (the “Program”). ・THIS AGREEMENT SHALL COME INTO EFFECT BETWEEN CAPCOM CO., LTD. AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. Please confirm the terms above and agree to this Agreement before purchasing the Program. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■A limited part of the base game can be played for free. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■This game can be played without a controller, however we recommend using a controller as the game has been optimized for controller use. ■This application is approximately 35GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. We recommend downloading the data in an environment with good connectivity. ■Save data upload and download functionality via iCloud Drive has been added. ■Save data cannot be uploaded and downloaded between MacOS and iOS devices. ■Resident Evil Village does not support Universal Purchase. ■Purchase Precautions ・After purchase, returns (including exchange for other products/services) will not be provided for any reason. ・In-app purchases can only be used by the Apple Account that made the purchase and cannot be shared with Family Sharing members. ■Compatible OSs and Devices https://www.capcom-games.com/apple/en-us/ ------------------------------------------------------------ RESIDENT EVIL is a trademark and/or registered trademark of CAPCOM CO., LTD. and/or its subsidiaries in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Resident Evil Village
entry.summary:
Base Game: $39.99 → $9.99
All Access Voucher: $4.99 → $1.99
DLC pack: $19.99 → $9.99
Street Wolf Outfit: $2.99 → $2.29

  • Base Game：$39.99 → $9.99 [$9.99 ~ $39.99]

  • DLC pack：$19.99 → $9.99 [$9.99 ~ $19.99]

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：$9.99
  • All Access Voucher：$1.99
  • DLC pack：$9.99
  • Street Wolf Outfit：$2.29

Application Description

Experience survival horror like never before in the 8th major installment in the Resident Evil franchise - Resident Evil Village. With detailed graphics, intense first-person action and masterful storytelling, the terror has never felt more realistic. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■In-App Purchases ■Resident Evil Village (Base Game) ・The Trauma Pack DLC ・Samurai Edge - AW Model-01 ・Resident Evil 7 Found Footage Filter ・Resident Evil 7 Tape Recorder Save Point ・Saferoom Music "Go Tell Aunt Rhody" ・Mr. Everywhere Weapon Charm ・Unlock "Village of Shadows" Difficulty ・The Tragedy of Ethan Winters Artwork ・The Baker Incident Report ・Survival Resources Pack ・Mr. Raccoon Weapon Charm ■Winters' Expansion ・Experience brand-new additional content for the award-winning modern horror masterpiece Resident Evil Village: Third Person Mode, The Mercenaries Additional Orders, and Shadows of Rose. ・Street Wolf Outfit ・Street Wolf Outfit for Rose (applies to Shadow of Rose content only) ■Extra Content Shop All Access Voucher ------------------------------------------------------------ ■By purchasing, you will be granted a license to use the product. ■A network connection is required when starting the application. ■About the End User License Agreement ・This End User License Agreement (this “Agreement”) applies to the user’s use of this game software program (the “Program”). ・THIS AGREEMENT SHALL COME INTO EFFECT BETWEEN CAPCOM CO., LTD. AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. Please confirm the terms above and agree to this Agreement before purchasing the Program. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■A limited part of the base game can be played for free. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■Keyboard and mouse are not supported. ■We recommend playing this game with a controller. It can be played on an iPad, but using a controller will provide a better experience. Note: Please check the Apple website for controllers compatible with iPad. Not all controllers will work as intended. ■This application is approximately 16GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. We recommend downloading the data in an environment with good connectivity. ■Estimated download time based on connection speed: 10Mbps - Over 3 hours 100Mbps - 30 to 40 minutes 300Mbps - 8 to 10 minutes ■Save data upload and download functionality via iCloud Drive has been added. ■Save data cannot be uploaded and downloaded between MacOS and iOS devices. ■Resident Evil Village does not support Universal Purchase. ■Purchase Precautions ・After purchase, returns (including exchange for other products/services) will not be provided for any reason. ・In-app purchases can only be used by the Apple Account that made the purchase and cannot be shared with Family Sharing members. ■Compatible OSs and Devices https://www.capcom-games.com/apple/en-us/ ------------------------------------------------------------ RESIDENT EVIL is a trademark and/or registered trademark of CAPCOM CO., LTD. and/or its subsidiaries in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Inkblade Idlers: Wuxia RPG
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 1000 Redemption Tickets：$9.99
  • 80 Redemption Tickets：$0.99

Application Description

Welcome to "Inkblade Idlers", where the serene beauty of ink-wash painting meets the thrilling world of wuxia martial arts in an idle RPG adventure. Effortless Progression, Deep Strategy Your heroes train and battle automatically, earning silver and experience even when you are offline. Return to spend resources on powerful skills, legendary weapons, and rare manuals to push your team further. Conquer Mighty Bosses, Collect Secret Manuals Face towering martial arts masters in epic showdowns. Each victory unlocks ancient secret manuals that teach your heroes unique and devastating abilities to customize your combat style. Manage Your Martial World Upgrade your shop to increase income, expand your backpack to hold more treasures, and strategically equip your team. Every decision strengthens your path to becoming the ultimate martial arts legend. Key Features: - Breathtaking ink-wash art inspired by traditional Chinese painting - True idle gameplay with progress happening 24/7 - Collect and customize hundreds of weapons, armor, and martial arts manuals - Strategic management of shops, resources, and inventory - Challenging boss fights against powerful martial arts masters Download Inkblade Idlers now and begin your tranquil yet powerful journey to martial arts supremacy. No grinding required.

entry.title: MEGA MAN X DiVE Offline
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$29.99 → $2.99 [$0.99 ~ $29.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

Application Description

■■ Caution ■■ Please check the "Regarding Purchases" and "Supported Devices" notices below before purchasing or using the app. --- Game Introduction --- Mega Man X DiVE reimagined the world of the Mega Man X series, and now it's getting an offline version! Experience the exciting side-scrolling action we've all come to know and love in a whole new light! Enter Deep Log, a digital world where the game data of the Mega Man X series has been archived. Due to a bug of unknown origins, the game data within Deep Log has become fragmented. With the help of a mysterious navigator, RiCO, the player dives into this digital world to set things straight. Take control of Hunter Programs, recreations of legendary characters such as X and Zero, defeat various forms of Irregular Data, and restore the fractured game data! - Classic Mega Man Action Jump, dash, fire your buster, and swing your saber. All the actions you'd expect from the Mega Man X series are here! In addition, this game features 360 degree aiming and an auto-lock function! You can also scale and position the touchscreen controls to match your own unique playstyle. - Featuring over 100 Characters from the Mega Man Series Acquire your favorite characters from across the Mega Man universe to add to your collection, and level them up to make them stronger! With a mix of brand-new original characters and new designs for fan-favorites, there are plenty out there to discover! - An All-New Original Story with Hundreds of Stages to Enjoy Immerse yourself in a new Mega Man tale that can only be experienced in Mega Man X DiVE. Blast and cut your way through hundreds of stages spanning multiple difficulty levels! - Make Your Characters Stronger with Weapons, Chips, and Cards Characters can equip all types of weapons to become stronger. Upgrade a weapon's rank to increase its power and unlock new skills. Cards featuring classic illustrations also provide boosts, making them fun items to collect as you craft your perfect Hunter Program! 【Regarding Purchases】 Regardless of the reason, we cannot offer refunds (or an exchange for another product or service) once the app is purchased. 【Supported Devices】 Please check the following URL for a list of operating environments (devices/OSs) supported by this app. https://www.capcom-games.com/megaman/xdive-offline/en-us/ Note: Although you can purchase this app using devices and OSs not listed as supported, the app may not function properly. Please be aware that we can neither guarantee the app's performance nor offer refunds if you use a device or OS not supported by the app. 【Enjoy More Capcom Titles!】 Search for "Capcom" in the App Store, or the name of one of our apps, for more fun games to play!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ace Attorney Trilogy
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$24.99 → $14.99 [$14.99 ~ $24.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$14.99

Application Description

■■ Caution ■■ Please check the "Regarding Purchases" and "Supported Devices" notices below before purchasing or using the app. --- Game Introduction --- Become a lawyer and take the stand to prove your client’s innocence in a court of law! Enjoy rookie attorney Phoenix Wright's first three games in the popular series, all in one package! All 14 thrilling episodes of Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney, Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney – Justice for All, and Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney – Trials and Tribulations are included!F6 With high-resolution graphics, courtroom battles never looked this beautiful! On top of Japanese and English, you can experience the world of Ace Attorney in French, German, Chinese (simplified and traditional), and Korean as well! Just swap to your preferred language in the Options menu! The number of save slots has increased to ten! There are now ten save slots per language available across all three games! 【Game Overview】 There's been a murder! Uncover the truth to save your innocent client! - Investigation Gather information and evidence related to the case! - Courtroom Outwit cunning prosecutors and call out witnesses to discover what really happened by finding inconsistencies in their statements! Solve the intriguing mysteries behind each case and witness the final truth for yourself! Note: During normal conversation, you can fast-forward the dialogue by holding the text skip button. Note: This collection is the same as the one previously released on home gaming platforms. 【Regarding Purchases】 Regardless of the reason, we cannot offer refunds (or an exchange for another product or service) once the app is purchased. 【Supported Devices】 Please check the following URL for a list of operating environments (devices/OSs) supported by this app. https://www.capcom-games.com/product/en-us/aceattorney-trilogy-app/?t=openv Note: Although you can purchase this app using devices and OSs not listed as supported, the app may not function properly. Please be aware that we can neither guarantee the app's performance nor offer refunds if you use a device or OS not supported by the app. 【Enjoy More Capcom Titles!】 Search for "Capcom" in the App Store, or the name of one of our apps, for more fun games to play!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Street Fighter IV CE
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

A new warrior has entered the ring! Take control of 32 world warriors and test your mettle against players from around the world. Street Fighter IV: Champion Edition perfects the winning gameplay formula by offering higher resolution graphics, three new characters (Rose, Juri and Elena) wide screen support for newer iOS devices and a host of updates and refinements. Long time Street Fighter fans can jump into the action and have an instant familiarity with the controls. For more casual players Street Fighter IV features numerous settings and tutorials that put you on the path to victory. • Fight as 32 Street Fighter characters • Higher resolution graphics and wide screen support • Intuitive virtual pad controls allow players to execute full move sets including Unique Attacks, Special Moves, Focus Attacks, Super Combos and Ultra Combos • Take your game to the next level with a MFi controller like the Gamevice (MFi controllers do not work in menus, they fully function in multiplayer and single-player gameplay.) • Battle head-to-head against players from around the world via Wifi • Single player “arcade” and multiplayer modes. • Unleash super moves with a tap of the “SP” button. • Four levels of difficulty. Please check [Supported OS and Devices] in the lower part of HP. https://www.capcom-games.com/product/en-us/streetfighter4-championedition/?t=openv

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Resident Evil 4
entry.summary:
Base Game: $59.99 → $15.99
Extra DLC Pack: $19.99 → $14.99
Weapon Upgrade Ticket x5 (A): $9.99 → $7.49
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：$59.99 → $15.99 [$15.99 ~ $59.99]
  • Extra DLC Pack：$19.99 → $14.99 [$14.99 ~ $19.99]
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x5 (A)：$9.99 → $7.49 [$7.49 ~ $9.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Base Game：$15.99
  • Separate Ways：$9.99
  • Extra DLC Pack：$14.99
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x5 (A)：$7.49
  • Attaché Case: 'Gold'：$0.99
  • Charm: 'Handgun Ammo'：$0.99
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x3 (A)：$6.99
  • Charm: 'Green Herb'：$0.99
  • Attaché Case: 'Classic'：$0.99
  • Weapon Upgrade Ticket x1 (A)：$2.99

Application Description

Survival is just the beginning. Six years have passed since the biological disaster in Raccoon City. Agent Leon S. Kennedy, one of the survivors of the incident, has been sent to rescue the president's kidnapped daughter. He tracks her to a secluded European village, where there is something terribly wrong with the locals. And the curtain rises on this story of daring rescue and grueling horror where life and death, terror and catharsis intersect. Featuring modernized gameplay, a reimagined storyline, and vividly detailed graphics, Resident Evil 4 marks the rebirth of an industry juggernaut. Relive the nightmare that revolutionized survival horror. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■By purchasing, you will be granted a license to use the product. ■A network connection is required when starting the application. ■About the End User License Agreement ・This End User License Agreement (this “Agreement”) applies to the user’s use of this game software program (the “Program”). ・THIS AGREEMENT SHALL COME INTO EFFECT BETWEEN CAPCOM CO., LTD. AND USER(S) UPON INSTALLATION OF THE PROGRAM BY THE USER. ・Those users between the ages of 13 and 18 (or between 13 and the age of legal majority in your country of residence) or a person with limited capacity shall install the Program only after obtaining approval from its parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these provisions of this Agreement. Please confirm the terms above and agree to this Agreement before purchasing the Program. ------------------------------------------------------------ ■A limited part of the base game can be played for free. In order to play the full game, an in-app purchase is required. ■Keyboard and mouse are not supported. ■We recommend playing this game with a controller. It can be played on an iPad, but using a controller will provide a better experience. Note: Please check the Apple website for controllers compatible with iPad. Not all controllers will work as intended. ■This application is approximately 30GB. Important Note: The installation process requires that you have at least twice the size of the application in free storage space available. We recommend downloading the data in an environment with good connectivity. ■Estimated download time based on connection speed: 10Mbps - Over 6 hours 100Mbps - 30 to 40 minutes 300Mbps - 8 to 10 minutes ■Save data can be uploaded and downloaded between MacOS and iOS devices. ■Purchase Precautions ・After purchase, returns (including exchange for other products/services) will not be provided for any reason. ・In-app purchases can only be used by the Apple Account that made the purchase and cannot be shared with Family Sharing members. ■Compatible OSs and Devices https://www.capcom-games.com/apple/en-us/ ------------------------------------------------------------ RESIDENT EVIL is a trademark and/or registered trademark of CAPCOM CO., LTD. and/or its subsidiaries in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Solar Arc – Sun & Moon Tracker
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $4.99 [$1.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

Application Description

Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not. - Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts. - Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance. - Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen. SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel. ARC MODE The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together. GRADIENT MODE Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day. LUNAR TRACKING Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be. 52-WEEK FORECAST What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit. FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot. Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around. Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it. Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today. Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you. FEATURES - Live gradient line and arc visualizations - Sun view, moon view, or dual view - Golden hour and blue hour timing - Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination - 52-week forecast for any date - Five activity modes - Medium and large home screen widgets - Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour - Multi-location with automatic timezone handling - Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms - Fully offline. No tracking. No account required. WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR? Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are. -- One purchase. No subscription. No ads. Yours forever. Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com
